fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: New Hampshire Speech-Language Pathologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to New Hampshire - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: speech-language pathologist license reciprocity new hampshire, how to transfer speech-language pathologist license to new hampshire, speech-language pathologist compact new hampshire, new hampshire speech-language pathologist endorsement application

board.name: Allied Health Professionals Board
board.parent_dept: New Hampshire Office of Professional Licensure and Certification (OPLC)

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: Full credential for independent SLP practice in New Hampshire.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: For SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Earn a Master's Degree in SLP

telepractice_text: New Hampshire permits telepractice for licensed SLPs and is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: New Hampshire issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: New Hampshire is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does a New Hampshire SLP license cost?
Is New Hampshire part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does New Hampshire allow telepractice for SLPs?
Does New Hampshire have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?
faqs.answer: Yes. New Hampshire participates in the ASLP-IC. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in New Hampshire without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to New Hampshire?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in New Hampshire while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: New Hampshire is a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
